mock_app.prompt_template: You are a helpful assistant. User asked: {user_input}
mock_app.description: Mock app for testing without API keys

default_llm.system_prompt: You are a helpful, accurate, and concise general assistant.
default_llm.description: General purpose LLM assistant with auto task detection

rag_bot.system_prompt: You are a document assistant. Answer ONLY from the provided context.
rag_bot.description: Document Q&A always uses RAG pipeline

code_agent.system_prompt: You are an expert coding assistant. Think step by step. Use available tools when needed. Always explain your reasoning before taking action.
code_agent.description: Agentic coding assistant always uses Agent pipeline
